audit_items.proof_trace: getChunks contains zero raw heap allocations (no new/malloc/SASS_MEMORY_NEW). All local variables are std::vector<T> with automatic storage duration where T=std::vector<SelectorComponentObj> (SharedImpl<SelectorComponent>, a reference-counted smart pointer). C++ RAII guarantees destructors are called on every exit path including exceptions, and the SharedImpl refcount mechanism ensures no object is leaked when vectors are destroyed.
